integration_points: Pre-commit hooks: Automatically scan for secrets before commits
CI/CD pipeline: Integrate security scanning into build process
Development workflow: Provide scanning tools for developers
Deployment process: Verify security before deployment
Incident response: Provide forensic capabilities for secret leaks
Compliance reporting: Generate reports for audits and compliance

tasks: Implement multiple detection algorithms (regex, entropy, ML-based)
Set up scanning for all repository files (excluding known safe paths)
Implement real-time alerting for critical secrets
Set up compliance reporting and tracking

success_metrics: Detect 100% of known secret patterns in test scenarios
Verify .gitignore protects all required secret file patterns
Confirm token rotation mechanisms are documented and verifiable
Generate actionable security reports with clear remediation steps
Integrate seamlessly into development workflow without friction
Provide compliance-ready reporting for audits and assessments
